title: Taking Turns
lesson: Waiting and taking turns means everyone gets a chance to play.
prompts: In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, warm sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left waving a cheerful hello, facing the camera with a happy, curious expression and the face fully visible. To the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} wave back near the slide ladder, smiling. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, warm sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, raising both hands in surprise, facing the camera with a slightly surprised expression and the face clearly visible. To the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} crowd in close together, all of them reaching toward the slide ladder at once, eager to climb. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, warm sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, facing the camera with a calm, friendly smile and the face fully visible, one hand raised gently as if suggesting everyone wait their turn. To the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} stand back from the slide ladder, listening and nodding. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, warm sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, facing the camera and clapping with a cheerful, encouraging expression and the face fully visible. To the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} slides down the red slide with arms up and a delighted grin, while {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} stands beside the slide cheering. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, warm sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits alone at the bottom of the slide having just slid down, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, beaming with a joyful smile. They are the only person in the frame. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, golden afternoon light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, facing the camera with a big happy smile and the face fully visible. To the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} stand together laughing and playing happily, all three holding hands in a row. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
texts: You came to the playground and saw a shiny red slide. Two friends were there too. "Let's play!" you said.
But everyone rushed to the ladder at once. It was too crowded, and nobody could climb.
"Let's take turns," you said gently, raising your hand. Your friends nodded and stepped back.
One friend slid down first — wheee! You clapped and cheered for her.
Then it was your turn. Down you zoomed to the bottom with a great big smile!
Everyone got a turn, and everyone had fun. You all held hands, as happy as can be.
